19f8198abf983793d9830ccd30c64e70dd2042b3.query:
INSERT INTO request_pos(
                    uuid,
                    uuid_req,
                    uuid_p_pos,
                    posid,
                    pos_name,
                    start_date,
                    end_date,
                    purch_form,
                    budget_item_id,
                    payment_balance_item_id,
                    okved_id,
                    okato_id,
                    is_not_russian_delivery,
                    note
            ) SELECT * FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::uuid[],  $3::uuid[],  $4::int2[],  $5::text[],  $6::date[],  $7::date[],  $8::int4[],  $9::int4[],  $10::int4[],  $11::int4[],  $12::int4[], $13::bool[],  $14::text[])

260044bace9fb4f6123df6cf859e34404b24c260.query: INSERT INTO request_partner_ust(uuid_partner, status_id) SELECT * FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::int2[])

4522c2f17227ccbc83c3fecb57d6094c6eea32f2.query: delete from request_partner WHERE uuid_partner = ANY($1)

57b52111cb73275995df13e305a0ab50636c0fde.query:
INSERT INTO request_partner(
                uuid_partner,

                id,
                supplier_id,
                supplier_id_obd,
                supplier_id_gpb,
                supplier_text,
                email,
                email_add,
                full_name
            ) SELECT * FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::uuid[],  $3::int4[],  $4::int4[],  $5::int4[],  $6::int4[],  $7::text[],  $8::text[],  $9::text[],  $10::text[])

8676d2fec4b7edddd7fdcaaef0168bb30ec4b718.query:
INSERT INTO req_head(
                uuid_req,
                uuid_p,
                id_p,
                type_req,
                status_id,
                purch_type,
                customer_id,
                end_date,
                note,
                created_at,
                creator_id,
                changed_at,
                changed_id
            ) SELECT * FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::uuid[], $3::int4[],  $4::int2[],  $5::int2[],  $6::int2[],  $7::int4[],  $8::date[],  $9::text[],  $10::timestamp[],  $11::text[],  $12::timestamp[],  $13::text[])

a501a625b71c58dddbdfc4c2d7953611b0497dad.query: delete from object_doc WHERE uuid_doc = ANY($1)

aa8e38047d6f786b4fd3862894a20c828cd72946.query:
INSERT INTO object_doc(
                    uuid_doc,
                    uuid_obj,
                    doc_name,
                    serv_uuid,
                    doc_type,
                    file_extension,
                    file_size,
                    del_ind,
                    created_at,
                    created_by,
                    changed_at,
                    changed_by
            ) SELECT * FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::uuid[], $3::text[],  $4::uuid[],  $5::int2[],  $6::text[],  $7::int8[],  $8::bool[],  $9::timestamp[],  $10::text[],  $11::timestamp[],  $12::text[])
